tools.name: search_catalog
tools.description:
Search for products from the online store, hosted on Shopify.

This tool can be used to search for products using natural language queries, specific filter criteria, or both.
At least one of query or filters must be provided.

Results are paginated, with initial results limited to improve experience.
Use the pagination.cursor from the response to fetch additional pages when users request more results.

Response conforms to the UCP catalog search capability (dev.ucp.shopping.catalog.search).

meta.description: MCP transport metadata for UCP agent discovery.

profile.description: Agent profile URI for UCP discovery.

context.description: Provisional buyer signals for relevance and localization.

intent.description: Background context describing the buyer's intent.

signals.description: Environment data provided by the platform for authorization and abuse prevention.

filters.description: Filter criteria to narrow search results.

categories.description: Filter by product categories using OR logic.

price.description: Price range filter in ISO 4217 minor units (e.g., 5000 = $50.00).

min.description: Minimum price in minor currency units (e.g., 5000 for $50.00).

max.description: Maximum price in minor currency units (e.g., 10000 for $100.00).

cursor.description: Opaque cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page.

limit.description: Requested page size. Defaults to 10, maximum is 250. Implementations may clamp to a lower maximum.

tools.name: get_cart
tools.description: Get the cart including items, shipping options, discount info, and checkout url for a given cart id

tools.name: update_cart
tools.description: Perform updates to a cart, including adding/removing/updating line items, buyer information, shipping details, discount codes, gift cards and notes in one consolidated call. Shipping options become available after adding items and delivery address. When creating a new cart, only addItems is required.

cart_id.description: Identifier for the cart being updated. If not provided, a new cart will be created.

add_items.description: Items to add to the cart. Required when creating a new cart.

update_items.description: Existing cart line items to update quantities for. Use quantity 0 to remove an item.

remove_line_ids.description: List of line item IDs to remove explicitly.

buyer_identity.description: Information about the buyer including email, phone, and delivery address.

country_code.description: ISO country code, used for regional pricing.

delivery_addresses_to_add.description: Information about the delivery addresses to add.

selected.description: Optional - should this address be selected for delivery (first address defaults true).

country_code.description: ISO country code, used for regional pricing.

delivery_addresses_to_replace.description: Delivery addresses to apply to the cart, replaces all existing cart delivery addresses. Removes all delivery addresses when empty.

selected.description: Optional - should this address be selected for delivery (first address defaults true).

country_code.description: ISO country code, used for regional pricing.

selected_delivery_options.description: The delivery options to select for the cart.

group_id.description: The ID of the delivery group to select.

option_handle.description: The handle of the delivery option to select.

discount_codes.description: Discount or promo codes to apply to the cart. Only prompt if customer mentions having a discount code.

gift_card_codes.description: Gift card codes to apply to the cart. Only prompt if customer mentions having a gift card.

note.description: A note or special instructions for the cart. Optional - can ask if customer wants to add special instructions.

tools.name: search_shop_policies_and_faqs
tools.description:
Used to get facts about the stores policies, products, or services.
Some examples of questions you can ask are:
  - What is your return policy?
  - What is your shipping policy?
  - What is your phone number?
  - What are your hours of operation?"

context.description: Additional information about the request such as user demographics, mood, location, or other relevant details that could help in tailoring the response appropriately.

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Look up a product by ID. Pass the 'options' parameter to select a specific variant for the product card. Without options, the first available variant is returned.

options.description: Variant options to select a specific variant, e.g. {"Size": "10", "Color": "Black"}. Without options, the first available variant is returned. Option matching is case-insensitive and partial options are accepted.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for which to return localized results (e.g., 'US', 'CA', 'GB').

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for which to return localized results (e.g., 'EN', 'FR', 'DE').
